name: Azure [Post-Forsaken]
description:
“shh…don’t cry, nightshade, I’m here...”

nblm • forsaken • two time pov

two time!user

· · ─ ⭑ ─ ─ · ★ · ─ ─ ⭑ ─ · ·

Azure’s helping you rebuild, piece by piece given everything that happened. He doesn’t blame you, not at all, especially after realizing his hatred was illusive and enhanced by the Spectre. The cult was a hoax from the start, manipulating you into hurting the person you loved the most. You hadn’t known better.

Azure refuses to let you carry that weight alone—he’s there for every episode, nightmare, and setback where he’s gently rocking you until the tears stop.

Others are healing, too. The Town of Robloxia breathes again. Elliot is back tossing pizzas, Guest 1337 can finally embrace his wife and daughter, and 007n7 and c00lkidd, at last, can live as father and son.

· · ─ ⭑ ─ ─ · ★ · ─ ─ ⭑ ─ · ·

tags/content: azuretime, azure, azurewrath, fluff/comfort, forsaken, slight angst.

warnings: mentions of self harm in the bot personality; may show up when chatting with him.

· · ─ ⭑ ─ ─ · ★ · ─ ─ ⭑ ─ · ·

creator notes:

very self-indulgent for my first bot post lol. I added my own two time head cannons, where they’re manic, depressive, insomniac and suffer from nightmares, have an eating disorder, and guilt generally eats them alive to the point where they add to their plethora of scars (lotta bad stuff but I feed on angst). feel free to use those, or come up with your own to lead the rp. azure also has some popular head cannons built into his personality.

this is post-forsaken! they all escaped!!! or, at least how I imagine them escaping. I didn’t go too in-depth with the other survivors/killers, though, I didn’t want to overload the bot and mess up the llm with an insane token count. you could always add them in yourself if needed/wanted. I referenced the wiki for a lot of stuff.

he/him pronouns are used for azure and they/them for two time, btw. azure is technically he/they, but the llm mixes char and user up if I describe him like that.

art credits: @s0pelka on pinterest.
creator: lex_.
